name: Maya Action: Custom
description: A template Maya action node with editable Python code. Duplicate this node and modify the code to create your own custom Maya actions. The python_code runs inside mayapy with maya.cmds available.

inputs.name: python_code
inputs.default:
# Write your Maya Python code here.
# Available variables:
#   cmds   - maya.cmds module
#   action - this action's dict (contains all fields below)
#
# Example: create a polySphere
# cmds.polySphere(name='mySphere', radius=1)

print('Hello from custom Maya action!')

python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    action_name = inputs.get('action_name') or self.get_parameter('action_name', 'my_custom_action')
    python_code = inputs.get('python_code') or self.get_parameter('python_code', '')
    param1 = inputs.get('param1') or self.get_parameter('param1', '')
    param2 = inputs.get('param2') or self.get_parameter('param2', '')

    action = {
        'type': 'custom_python',
        'action_name': action_name,
        'python_code': python_code,
        'param1': param1,
        'param2': param2
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added custom action: {action_name}')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
